title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates:
Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates!
